name: THE END ZONE BAR AND GRILL

violations.description: Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment did not meet proper design and/or construction characteristics. -The chest freezer in the back storage room has duct tape across the entire length of the seals.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Prep Table on the grill line was checked multiple times and in various locations and concluded that the unit was not maintaining its temperature. Thermostat was adjusted and the result improved however was still above the required minimum temperature.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Two trays of hamburger patties were in two separate locations were not date marked. Other food trays were properly marked but the hamburger patties were not. Maintain consistent date marking on all food items.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitation pails using both bleach and using Quat were too strong. We evaluated their ratio, discussed and made adjustments until it was at a safe level to use on food contact surfaces.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
